name: Pack Master
short_description: This is a simulation game where you play as a "Rich Man" with 1 million to spend freely in a live streaming room. You'll experience the thrilling sensation of card opening in live streams and challenge your luck.
detailed_description:
This is a simulation game about opening card packs in a live stream room, where you can experience the thrill of spending lavishly like a boss.
More than 15 card boxes await your opening.
Over 30 rare cards await your opening.
Choose between male and female streamers.
Authentically simulates the atmosphere of a card unpacking live stream.
You are the next chosen one—the King of Luck.
Good luck!!!
